name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small-savings scheme that helps parents or guardians build a long-term fund for the education and future needs of a girl child.

benefit.amount: Up to INR 1.5 lakh deposit per financial year
benefit.description: Eligible deposits earn the notified interest rate; withdrawals and maturity follow scheme rules.

other_conditions: An account may be opened by a parent or legal guardian for an eligible resident Indian girl child before she turns 10, subject to account-limit rules.

non_financial: Long-term savings for a girl child

ai_metadata.estimated_processing_time: Account opening subject to document verification

ai_explanation.summary: Government-backed savings account for an eligible girl child.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm the girl child's age, residency, and guardian documentation with the authorised bank or post office.
common_rejection_reasons: Child age exceeds the opening limit
tips: Keep the passbook and child birth certificate safely for future transactions.
frequently_asked_questions: Can an account be opened at a post office?
next_steps: Visit an authorised post office or bank.
Submit the account-opening form and documents.

source.organization: Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: National initiative that promotes the survival, protection, education, and participation of girls through coordinated awareness and community action.

benefit.description: Promotes access to education, protection, and support services for girls; it is not an individual cash-transfer scheme.

other_conditions: Services and activities are delivered through local implementation and convergence with education, health, and child-protection systems.

application.portal: Ministry of Women and Child Development

ai_explanation.summary: A national initiative to improve outcomes and access to services for girls.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Contact the local Anganwadi centre, school, or district women and child-development office for available activities and linked services.
common_rejection_reasons: Not applicable; local service availability may vary
tips: Ask local officials about linked education, nutrition, and protection services.
frequently_asked_questions: Does Beti Bachao Beti Padhao provide a cash benefit?
next_steps: Contact the local Women and Child Development office.

source.organization: Ministry of Women and Child Development
